syntaxhighlight-desc: Waxay bixisaa muujinta naxwe <syntaxhighlight> iyadoo la adeegsanayo [http://pygments.org/ Pygments - muujiyaha syntax ee Python]
syntaxhighlight-error-category: Bogag leh khaladaad muujinta naxwaha koodhka
syntaxhighlight-error-category-desc: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayay in la muujiyo koodhka ku jira bogga.
syntaxhighlight-enclose-category: Bogag isticmaalaya sifooyin enclose oo la joojiyay
syntaxhighlight-enclose-category-desc: Muujinta naxwaha koodhka ee bogga waxay adeegsanaysaa qaab enclose oo la joojiyay.
syntaxhighlight-source-category: Bogag isticmaalaya calaamado source oo la joojiyay
syntaxhighlight-source-category-desc: Muujinta naxwaha koodhka ee bogga waxay adeegsanaysaa calaamado source oo la joojiyay.
syntaxhighlight-error-pygments-invocatio: Ku guuldarreystay in la kiciyo Pygments
syntaxhighlight-error-exceeds-size-limit: Cabbirka koodhka $1 {{PLURAL:$1|baytyada}} wuxuu ka badan yahay xadka la oggol yahay ee $2 {{PLURAL:$2|baytyada}}
